name: OBO Scope Mismatch
failure_mode: Wrong scope used in OBO token exchange — e.g. api://wrong-client-id/.default instead of the correct audience. Exchange returns insufficient_claims error.
remediation: 1. Check AEGISAP_OBO_SCOPES env var. 2. Verify app registration exposes the correct scope. 3. Re-run verify_delegated_identity_contract.py.
